brief_justification: Arrives at the exact correct answer with a fully verified valid schedule; goes one level beyond surface by explaining why the capacity argument fails (T3/T4 occupy different rooms in same slot); implicitly rechecks its schedule but never names potential reasoning biases or shortcuts; applies explicit constraint-by-constraint verification table covering all 7 rules; states conclusion confidently without distinguishing known facts from assumptions or noting what would falsify it; presents only one valid schedule with no alternative schedules or impossibility proof strategies considered; every assigned position is shown and traceable in the table plus the constraint audit; avoids double-booking and verifies it explicitly but does not articulate why the double-booking anti-pattern would be wrong; avoids blind execution and unresolved conflicts but does not address suppressed modes explicitly; response is linear — presents solution then verifies, with no branching gates or loops reflecting the topology's G1/G2 decision structure.
